sentences.target: Ich lese eine kurze Erzählung für morgen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʊʁtsə ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡən/

translations.de: Ich lese eine kurze Erzählung für morgen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʊʁtsə ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡən/
translations.en: I’m reading a short story for tomorrow.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un cuento para mañana.
translations.fr: Je lis une nouvelle pour demain.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un racconto per domani.
translations.ko: 내일을 위해 짧은 단편소설을 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在为明天读一篇短篇小说。
translations.yue: 我為咗聽日睇一篇短篇小說。
translations.ru: Я читаю короткий рассказ на завтра.
translations.pt: Estou lendo um conto para amanhã.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một truyện ngắn cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik lees een kort verhaal voor morgen.
translations.uk: Я читаю коротке оповідання на завтра.
translations.hi: मैं कल के लिए एक छोटी कहानी पढ़ रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg leser en kort novelle til i morgen.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca sebuah cerpen untuk besok.
translations.sv: Jag läser en novell till imorgon.
translations.da: Jeg læser en kort novelle til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日に備えて短編小説を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; agrees with 'Ich'.
Indefinite article; marks the following noun as indefinite (feminine singular accusative).
Attributive adjective modifying 'Erzählung'; inflected to agree in gender/number/case (fem sg acc).
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'lese' in accusative singular.
Preposition introducing a PP expressing purpose/time; governs an accusative/temporal complement.
Temporal adverb meaning 'tomorrow'; here complement to the preposition 'für' indicating time.

sentences.target: Die Erzählung gefällt mir wirklich sehr.

translations.de: Die Erzählung gefällt mir wirklich sehr.
translations.zh-Hans: 我真的很喜欢这个故事。
translations.yue: 我真係好鍾意呢個故事。
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích câu chuyện này.
translations.nl: Ik vind het verhaal echt heel leuk.
translations.hi: मुझे यह कहानी वाकई बहुत पसंद है।
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się to opowiadanie.
translations.cs: Ta povídka se mi opravdu moc líbí.
translations.da: Jeg kan virkelig godt lide novellen.
translations.ja: この物語がとても気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks 'Erzählung' as definite (feminine singular nominative).
Common noun (feminine); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a dative experiencer.
Personal pronoun in dative (1st person singular); experiencer of 'gefällt'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the evaluation, modifying the degree ('sehr'/'gefällt').
Degree adverb; strengthens the predicate 'gefällt'.

sentences.target: Wir besprechen die Erzählung nach dem Unterricht.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ bəˈʃpʁɛçən diː ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ naːx deːm ˈʊntɐʁʁɪçt/

translations.de: Wir besprechen die Erzählung nach dem Unterricht.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ bəˈʃpʁɛçən diː ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ naːx deːm ˈʊntɐʁʁɪçt/
translations.en: We’re discussing the story after class.
translations.es: Vamos a comentar el cuento después de clase.
translations.fr: On va discuter de la nouvelle après le cours.
translations.it: Parliamo del racconto dopo la lezione.
translations.ko: 수업 끝나고 그 이야기를 얘기할 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 下课后我们会讨论这篇小说。
translations.yue: 放學之後我哋會傾嗰篇小說。
translations.pt: Vamos conversar sobre o conto depois da aula.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ thảo luận về truyện sau giờ học.
translations.nl: We bespreken het verhaal na de les.
translations.hu: Az óra után megbeszéljük a történetet.
translations.hi: कक्षा के बाद हम कहानी पर चर्चा करेंगे।
translations.el: Θα συζητήσουμε το διήγημα μετά το μάθημα.
translations.nb: Vi skal diskutere novellen etter timen.
translations.id: Kami akan membahas cerita itu setelah kelas.
translations.sv: Vi ska diskutera novellen efter lektionen.
translations.da: Vi skal diskutere novellen efter timen.
translations.ja: 授業のあとでその物語について話し合います。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; inseparable prefix verb meaning 'to discuss'.
Definite article; marks 'Erzählung' as definite (feminine singular accusative).
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'besprechen' in accusative singular.
Preposition introducing a temporal PP; governs dative.
Definite article; dative singular (masculine) with 'Unterricht'.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'nach' in dative singular (time reference).

sentences.target: Er schreibt eine Erzählung über seine Kindheit.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃʁaɪ̯pt ˈaɪ̯nə ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ ˈyːbɐ ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈkɪnthait/

translations.de: Er schreibt eine Erzählung über seine Kindheit.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃʁaɪ̯pt ˈaɪ̯nə ɛɐ̯ˈtsɛːlʊŋ ˈyːbɐ ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈkɪnthait/
translations.en: He’s writing a story about his childhood.
translations.es: Está escribiendo un cuento sobre su infancia.
translations.fr: Il écrit une nouvelle sur son enfance.
translations.it: Sta scrivendo un racconto sulla sua infanzia.
translations.ko: 그는 자신의 어린 시절에 대한 이야기를 쓰고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在写一篇关于他童年的故事。
translations.yue: 佢喺寫一篇關於佢童年嘅故事。
translations.ru: Он пишет рассказ о своём детстве.
translations.pt: Ele está escrevendo um conto sobre a sua infância.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang viết một truyện về tuổi thơ của mình.
translations.nl: Hij schrijft een verhaal over zijn jeugd.
translations.uk: Він пише оповідання про своє дитинство.
translations.hi: वह अपने बचपन के बारे में एक कहानी लिख रहा है।
translations.el: Γράφει ένα διήγημα για την παιδική του ηλικία.
translations.nb: Han skriver en novelle om barndommen sin.
translations.id: Dia sedang menulis sebuah cerita tentang masa kecilnya.
translations.sv: Han skriver en novell om sin barndom.
translations.ro: El scrie o povestire despre copilăria lui.
translations.da: Han skriver en novelle om sin barndom.
translations.ja: 彼は自分の子ども時代についての物語を書いています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Er'.
Indefinite article; marks the following noun as indefinite (feminine singular accusative).
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'schreibt' in accusative singular.
Preposition introducing a topical PP; here governs accusative.
Possessive determiner functioning as a prenominal modifier; agrees with 'Kindheit' (fem sg acc).
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'über' in accusative singular.
